name: roadmap
description: Actionable roadmap — outcome-driven milestones, dependency and risk register, success metrics, and review cadence.
argument-hint: "[product-or-team] [time-horizon]"
user-invocable: true

disable-model-invocation: false
---

# Roadmap (Vision → Milestones → Execution) (Elite)

## When to use

- You want a roadmap that stays actionable (not a slide deck).

- You want milestones tied to deliverables and risks.

## Workflow

1) Define outcomes (not just features).
2) Break into milestones (timeboxed).
3) Identify dependencies and risks.
4) Define success metrics per milestone.
5) Review cadence (monthly/quarterly).

## Self-check

- [ ] Each milestone has: outcome (not feature name), due date, success metric.

- [ ] Dependencies between milestones documented.

- [ ] Risk register maintained per milestone.

- [ ] Review cadence defined (who, when, what decisions).

- [ ] Roadmap distinguishes: committed (next quarter) vs directional (beyond).

## Outputs

- Roadmap structure (milestones + outcomes + metrics).

- Dependency/risk register outline.

- Review cadence checklist.
